sn1.22:1.0.1: v.53"It does not touch one who does not touch,But then will touch the one who touches.Therefore it touches the one who touches,The one who wrongs an innocent man."
sn1.22:1.0.2: v.54"If one wrongs an innocent man,A pure person without blemish,The evil falls back on the fool himselfLike fine dust thrown against the wind."
